title: Rizla Silver Rolling Paper Filter Tips - 50 Booklets x 50 Roach Tips
features: NEW! Quality! Rizla Silver Paper Filter Tips
Rizla Silver Paper Tips for the Ultimate Smoking Experience
Full Box of 50 Booklets - Each Booklet contains 50 Roach Tips

description: Rizla have been going since 1796 and now they have joined the tip party with the release of these quality Rizla "Silver" paper smoking tips. If your paper of choice is Rizla Silver these are a must to complete your smoking experience.
